compressed_regions.summary: Multiple backward and forward flag features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values equal to 1 and very low cardinality ratios, indicating near-constant values across the partition.
contextual_modifiers: Low cardinality features may indicate saturation or constant signaling in the partition.
compressed_regions.uncertainty_notes: The near-constant values could reflect either true invariance or measurement artifacts; no validation from partition context.

compressed_regions.summary: Several feature pairs exhibit perfect or near-perfect correlation (correlation=1 or 0.9993), indicating strong redundancy or deterministic relationships between features.
structural_descriptors: Bwd Packet Length Mean & Avg Bwd Segment Size
Fwd Header Length & Fwd Header Length.1
Fwd PSH Flags & SYN Flag Count
Fwd Packet Length Mean & Avg Fwd Segment Size
RST Flag Count & ECE Flag Count
Total Backward Packets & Subflow Bwd Packets
Total Fwd Packets & Subflow Fwd Packets
Total Length of Bwd Packets & Subflow Bwd Bytes
Total Length of Fwd Packets & Subflow Fwd Bytes
Packet Length Mean & Average Packet Size
contextual_modifiers: Strong dependencies suggest feature redundancy and potential deterministic relationships.
compressed_regions.uncertainty_notes: Perfect correlations may indicate feature duplication or derived features; no causal inference applied.

compressed_regions.summary: Several packet length and segment size features show significant class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and differing unique value counts between BENIGN and DDoS classes.
contextual_modifiers: Class-conditioned variation indicates structural differences in feature distributions between BENIGN and DDoS classes.
compressed_regions.uncertainty_notes: Variation patterns are descriptive; no validation of class labels or feature causality.

compressed_regions.summary: Destination Port feature shows strong distributional divergence between BENIGN and DDoS classes, with DDoS traffic concentrated on a single port and BENIGN traffic more diverse.
contextual_modifiers: Distributional concentration in DDoS class suggests port-based targeting or saturation.
compressed_regions.uncertainty_notes: Distributional metrics do not confirm attack validity; only descriptive divergence.

compressed_regions.summary: Partition overview reports moderate class imbalance, presence of duplicated rows, and top-ranked features dominated by backward packet length and segment size metrics.
structural_descriptors: Top features: Bwd Packet Length Mean (rank 1), Avg Bwd Segment Size (rank 2), Bwd Packet Length Max (rank 3), Bwd Packet Length Std (rank 4), Average Packet Size (rank 5)
contextual_modifiers: Duplicated rows may affect feature distribution and redundancy analysis.
Class imbalance is moderate but not extreme.
compressed_regions.uncertainty_notes: No validation of duplication impact or imbalance effect on downstream analysis.
